duplicates.fragment:
#### Economy Balancing Scenario

```
Task: "Balance late-game economy for better player retention"
- Analyze current progression curves in `src/utils/economyEngine.ts`
- Identify point where money becomes trivial
- Adjust gig payouts, travel costs, and upgrade scaling
- Test across 3-5 complete playthroughs
- Document balance rationale and player feedback
- Implement with comprehensive unit tests

| --------- | ------------------------------------ | ---------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `execute` | shell, Bash, powershell              | Shell execution  | Execute commands in appropriate shell       |
| `read`    | Read, NotebookRead, view             | File reading     | Read file contents                          |
| `edit`    | Edit, MultiEdit, Write, NotebookEdit | File editing     | Edit and modify files                       |
| `search`  | Grep, Glob, search                   | Code search      | Search for files or text in files           |
| `agent`   | custom-agent, Task                   | Agent invocation | Invoke other custom agents                  |
| `web`     | WebSearch, WebFetch                  | Web access       | Fetch web content and search                |
| `todo`    | TodoWrite                            | Task management  | Create and manage task lists (VS Code only) |

runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository (merge ref)
        uses: actions/checkout@v7

      - name: Install pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v6
        with:
          version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

      - name: Use Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version: '22.13.0'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts

      - name: Run Vitest Logic suite

name: Locale Smoke Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v7

      - name: Install pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v6
        with:
          version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

      - name: Use Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version: '22.13.0'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts

      - name: Run locale smoke tests

await Promise.race([
            destReachedBtn
              .waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 500 })
              .catch(() => null),
            tourbusHeading
              .waitFor({ state: 'hidden', timeout: 500 })
              .catch(() => null),
            tourbusMoveLeftBtn
              .waitFor({ state: 'hidden', timeout: 500 })
              .catch(() => null)
          ]).catch(() => {})

page
        .getByRole('button', { name: /continue/i, exact: true })
        .waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 2000 })
        .catch(() => null),
      page
        .getByRole('heading', { name: /gig report/i })
        .waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 2000 })
        .catch(() => null)

  if (!ts.isVariableDeclaration(decl) || !decl.initializer) return undefined
  let list = decl.parent
  while (list && !ts.isVariableDeclarationList(list)) list = list.parent
  if (!list || !(list.flags & ts.NodeFlags.Const)) return undefined

  const init = decl.initializer
